PSD Outputs

          
          
          
        

        

          Scans a folder for PSD exports (<name>.psd with matching
          _preview.png / _metadata.json) produced by the
          H-Gripe PSD Export node.

Embedding the running ComfyUI web UI.

            
Make sure ComfyUI is running at the URL above, then click Embed / Reload. The full node editor loads here inside the app.
